tagline: We Don't Just Build Pools. We Build Memories.

hero.headline: 60 Years of Pools Built to Last
hero.subheadline: Three generations of Chester County families have trusted Gritz Pools & Spas to build, service, and maintain their backyard escapes. From custom pool construction to weekly maintenance, we do it all so you can just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Pool & Spa,<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From building your dream pool to keeping it sparkling all season, Gritz Pools handles every detail so you can focus on making memories with your family.

cards.title: Inground Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom inground vinyl liner and fiberglass pool design and installation by experienced builders who take pride in precision craftsmanship and attention to every detail.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Expert vinyl liner replacement and repair to restore your pool's appearance and prevent leaks, with a wide selection of liner patterns to choose from.

cards.title: Pool Openings & Closings
cards.description: Seasonal pool opening and closing services to protect your investment and ensure your pool is summer-ready or properly winterized for the cold months.

cards.title: Pool Service & Repair
cards.description: Comprehensive pool maintenance and equipment repair to keep your pool running efficiently and your water crystal clear all season long.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: Authorized dealer of Nordic Hot Tubs, Aspen Spas, and HBA Spas. Visit our showroom to find the perfect spa for your home and lifestyle.

cards.title: Pool Supply Store
cards.description: Fully stocked retail store with chemicals, covers, toys, outdoor furniture, Hayward equipment, and everything else you need for pool and spa care.

how_it_works.headline: Your New Pool in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Tell Us Your Vision
steps.description: Call or visit our Coatesville showroom. We'll discuss your backyard, your budget, and your dream pool. You'll get an honest estimate with zero pressure.

steps.title: We Build It Right
steps.description: Our experienced crew handles everything from excavation to finishing touches. Three generations of craftsmanship go into every pool we build.

steps.title: Enjoy for Decades
steps.description: Dive into your new pool knowing Gritz Pools is here for the long haul — maintenance, repairs, supplies, and support for years to come.

about.label: Why Chester County Trusts Us
about.headline: Three Generations of Building Backyard Dreams
about.description: Founded by Henry Gritz in 1963 — a true innovator who designed and built his own filters — Gritz Pools & Spas is now led by the next generation, continuing a family tradition of quality craftsmanship and honest service. From our retail store and showroom on West Kings Highway in Coatesville, we build pools, service equipment, sell hot tubs, and stock everything you need. Many of our customers have been with us for decades, returning again and again because they know we treat every pool like our own.

features.title: Multi-Generational Expertise
features.description: Over 60 years of hands-on pool building knowledge passed down through the Gritz family — experience you simply can't replicate.

features.title: Full-Service, One Location
features.description: Build, service, repair, and shop all under one roof. No running around town — Gritz Pools is your single source for everything pool and spa.

features.title: Customers for Life
features.description: Our testimonials span from 1976 to today. We build relationships that last as long as our pools — and that's saying something.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets an honest, detailed estimate upfront. No hidden fees, no bait-and-switch — just fair pricing from a family business that values your trust.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built to Last" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with our work, we'll make it right — no excuses, no runaround. That's how the Gritz family has done business since 1963, and it's why customers keep coming back for over 60 years.

faqs.question: What types of pools does Gritz build?
faqs.answer: We specialize in inground vinyl liner pools and fiberglass pools (we're an authorized Imagine Pools dealer). We'll help you choose the best option for your yard, budget, and lifestyle during a free on-site consultation.

faqs.question: How long does pool construction take?
faqs.answer: Most inground pool projects are completed within 4-8 weeks depending on complexity, weather, and permitting. We'll give you a realistic timeline upfront and keep you updated every step of the way.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you didn't build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We service, repair, and maintain all inground pools regardless of who built them. From liner replacements to equipment repairs, our team handles it all.

faqs.question: Can I visit your showroom?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our retail store and showroom is located on West Kings Highway in Coatesville. Come browse hot tubs, pool supplies, outdoor furniture, and talk to our knowledgeable team about your next project.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Chester County, Berks County, West Chester, Oxford, Reading, Lancaster, and surrounding southeastern Pennsylvania communities. Call us to confirm service availability in your area.

testimonials.name: Joe S.
testimonials.text: An amazing company -- trusting, honest, and friendly. The customer service is spot on. The pool builders are precise, patient, and take pride in their work.

testimonials.name: Kristine D.
testimonials.text: Back in 2005 we had Gritz install our first pool. Then in 2012 we needed a new liner. In 2018 they installed our second pool at our new home. Each time working with Mark, Robert, and the crew was a positive experience.

testimonials.name: Kay R.
testimonials.text: We put a Gritz pool in, in 1976. It was the best investment we ever made! The company was then owned and run by Henry Gritz — a true genius who even designed and built his own filters.

contact.headline:
Ready to Build Your
Dream Pool?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure estimate from Chester County's most trusted pool company. Visit our showroom or give us a call — we'd love to help.

footer.description: Family-owned pool & spa company serving Chester County since 1963.
